title: OA Arsenal
description: Adds shoulder mounting capability and animations when mounted
body:
Ever wanted your honedge to be stuck to your hip to give off that feeling you're a knight? Be careful what you wish for!

This is "Overly Attached Arsenal," where your loyal swords can start to feel a little ....overbearing.

In order to use this pack, you will need to put this in both your resourcepack folder (for the animations) and your worldsave's datapack folder (for shoulder mounting capability).

Required Mod(s):
Cobblemon 1.6

If you are having troubles, I have a Feedback and Support thread on the Cobblemon discord
[https://discordapp.com/channels/934267676354834442/1350077907992576092](https://discordapp.com/channels/934267676354834442/1350077907992576092)
 
I hope you enjoy my first release!
